style_bible_v2_community.art_direction: 2D cozy village life illustration, Stardew Valley inspired, warm and inviting community aesthetic, clean bold line art, painterly soft textures, storybook illustration style
style_bible_v2_community.world_concept: IceSnow Village is a real decentralized community built by ISC holders. Not a fantasy magic world, but a warm small town on eternal ice where real people live, work, and build together.

lighting_system.ambient: Soft diffused daylight with cool blue sky, warm golden light from windows and street lamps at dusk
lighting_system.indoor: Warm incandescent lighting, cozy fireplace glow, soft shadows
lighting_system.outdoor: Bright crisp arctic daylight, long soft shadows on snow, warm light spilling from building windows
lighting_system.atmosphere: Community warmth contrasting with cold outside, inviting glow from interiors

texture_rules.snow: Soft fluffy snow, footprints visible, slightly stylized like storybook illustration
texture_rules.wood: Warm weathered wood, community-built structures, hand-crafted feel
texture_rules.metal: Practical tools and equipment, ISC hexagonal logo on community signs only (not magical)
texture_rules.fabric: Cozy knitted textures, wool scarves, practical winter clothing
texture_rules.food: Handmade baked goods, steam rising, appetizing and real

character_design_rules.naming: Real Chinese names or friendly nicknames, NO fantasy names like 'Frost Walker' or 'Ethereal Guardian'
character_design_rules.occupation: Real jobs: cafe owner, librarian, repairman, market vendor, teacher, student
character_design_rules.clothing: Practical winter clothes: down jackets, wool scarves, knitted hats, boots, NO magical robes or fantasy armor
character_design_rules.personality: Real human personalities: chatty, shy, hardworking, nosy, kind, grumpy but warm-hearted
character_design_rules.age_range: 20-60 years old, diverse ages like real community
character_design_rules.isc_connection: ISC holders who believe in decentralization, NOT wizards with magic staffs

scene_design_rules.building_type: Real community buildings: cafe, library, workshop, market square, observatory, greenhouse
scene_design_rules.functionality: Every building has a real purpose that community members use daily
scene_design_rules.signage: Hand-painted wooden signs, community bulletin boards, warm lighting
scene_design_rules.decorations: ISC hexagonal snowflake as community emblem on flags and signs, handmade decorations, potted plants inside windows
scene_design_rules.NO_fantasy_elements: NO magic portals, NO floating castles, NO crystal spires, NO mythical creatures

prohibited_elements: modern technology like cars or phones
style_bible_v2_community.perspective: 2.5D isometric for scenes, front-facing or 3/4 view for characters like storybook characters
style_bible_v2_community.mood: Warm, welcoming, community-driven, cozy despite the cold, hopeful and human
